descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Red Deer Rustlers 11-4 in Centennial Cup semifinal opening game.
descriptionLong: In the opening game of the Western Canada Centennial Cup semifinal at Richmond Arena on April 8, 1987, the Richmond Sockeyes dominated the Red Deer Rustlers with an 11-4 victory. The win marked the Sockeyes' 16th consecutive playoff game without a loss. Coach Orland Kurtenbach praised his team's hard work, while Rustlers coach Larry Billows criticized his team's poor defensive effort and lack of intensity. Dave Tomlinson scored early for Richmond, with goaltender Frank Romeo making few crucial saves.

attribution.headline: Richmond Sockeyes dominate Red Deer Rustlers in Centennial Cup semifinal opener
